selection_scope: Clean/SemiClean/node diagnostic only; original BUT report-only
rule_description: if endpoints disagree good-vs-medium and qrs_visibility <= 0.03784960, use alt medium-lean prediction; otherwise use base raw prediction
threshold_selection: threshold chosen only by train+val objective on endpoint disagreements
note: Rule-mode artifact only. It records two endpoint checkpoints plus a train+val-selected threshold; it does not overwrite ordinary checkpoint promotion.
